Who We Are

Craftsmanship & light, engineered for your brand

OJAS SIGNAGE SOLUTION is a Delhi-based signage studio that designs, fabricates and installs every kind of signboard your business needs — from a single hotel façade to a multi-unit industrial complex. Every project is built in-house, from the first sketch to the final installation.

  • ✓Premium Quality Materials
  • ✓Innovative Designs
  • ✓Experienced Team
  • ✓Affordable Pricing
  • ✓Professional Installation
  • ✓Timely Delivery

Our Services

Everything your brand needs to be seen

From glowing LED letters to full industrial fascia — every service is designed, fabricated and installed in-house.

LED Glow Sign Boards

Bright, energy-efficient LED lettering built to run day and night without fading.

ACP Sign Boards

Weatherproof composite panel signage for a clean, premium storefront finish.

Acrylic Letters

Precision-cut 3D acrylic lettering for elegant, minimal reception and facade branding.

Stainless Steel Letters

Mirror or brushed-finish metal letters that hold up to years of outdoor exposure.

Reception Branding

Backlit logo walls and reception signage that set the tone the moment guests walk in.

Hotel Signage

Statement façade and vertical signage that hotels are recognised by from the street.

Gym Signage

Bold, high-energy branding built for fitness studios and 24×7 gyms.

Restaurant Signage

Warm, inviting signage that fits the mood of your restaurant's identity.

Commercial Sign Boards

Retail and showroom signage engineered to draw the eye from the street.

Industrial Sign Boards

Large-format factory and warehouse fascia built for scale and visibility.

Direction Signage

Clear wayfinding boards that guide visitors through hotels, offices and campuses.

Neon Signage

Custom flex-neon pieces for cafés, salons and Instagram-ready storefronts.

Installation & Maintenance

End-to-end fitting, servicing and repair so your signage always looks its best.

Built for brands that don't compromise

Premium Materials

Sourced components built for years of outdoor use.

Advanced LED Technology

Energy-efficient, long-life illumination systems.

Custom Designs

Every sign designed specifically for your brand.

Experienced Professionals

A team with 5+ years of fabrication expertise.

Affordable Pricing

Premium finish without an inflated price tag.

Professional Installation

Fast Delivery

Our Process

From first call to final install

01

Consultation

We understand your brand, space and budget on-site or over a call.

02

Design

Concepts and 3D mock-ups are shared for your approval.

03

Manufacturing

Your signage is fabricated in-house with precision tooling.

04

Installation

Trained crews install safely with minimal disruption.

05

Final Delivery

A final walkthrough and handover, backed by after-sales support.

FAQ

Common questions

Most single-signboard installations are completed within 1–3 days after fabrication. Larger commercial or industrial projects are scoped with a clear timeline during consultation.

Yes — every project is designed around your brand, space and materials. We share design mock-ups before manufacturing begins.

Our core service area is Delhi NCR, and we take on select projects beyond it depending on scope. Get in touch and we'll confirm availability for your location.

We work with LED modules, ACP sheets, acrylic, stainless steel and flex-neon — chosen based on your signage type, budget and outdoor exposure.

Yes, we offer after-sales servicing and repair for all signage we install, including LED module replacement and structural checks.

Fill out the contact form below, WhatsApp us, or call Bharat Rai directly at 7011883005 — we typically respond with a quote within 24 hours.
